column1: Review Text

Came here on a whim and was totally blown away. The rooftop view is stunning, especially during evenings. Ordered their masala chai and a sandwich — both were spot on. Staff was warm and attentive. Definitely one of the better rooftop cafes in Jaipur I've been to.

Tea Connect in C Scheme is honestly a hidden gem in Jaipur. The ambiance is cozy, the menu is interesting, and the service is prompt. Had their high tea set and it was worth every rupee. Will definitely be bringing my family here next time.

Visited for a birthday celebration and the team made it super special. They decorated the table beautifully without us even asking. The food was delicious and the rooftop setup made for great photos. Best birthday party place in Jaipur for sure.

Honestly one of the most underrated cafes in C Scheme. Not many people know about this place but the vibe is incredible. Open air seating, gentle breeze, good music. It's become my go-to spot for weekend mornings.

Had a candle light dinner here last anniversary and it was magical. The soft lighting, rooftop setting, and warm service made the whole evening feel romantic. Food quality was excellent too. Best place for candle light dinner in Jaipur — no doubt.

Looking for a breakfast cafe near me and stumbled upon Tea Connect. The menu had so many options — parathas, eggs, toast, smoothies. Everything tasted fresh and homemade. Loved the open air setup. Will come back for sure.

This place near statue circle is a total gem. Quick to reach, great parking, and the cafe itself is beautiful. The rooftop seating is breezy and the chai here is outstanding. Perfect date night cafe for couples in Jaipur.

The sunset view from this rooftop is absolutely breathtaking. We sat there for over two hours just enjoying the chai and the view. Staff didn't rush us even once. This is easily the best sunset view point cafe in C Scheme.

Came for brunch with colleagues and everyone loved it. The Indian cuisine options are solid — dal, sabzi, paneer dishes — all really flavorful. The rooftop restaurant vibe adds to the experience. Good value for the quality.

Finally found a work-friendly cafe in C Scheme that doesn't make you feel guilty for sitting long hours. Good WiFi, plug points near seats, quiet atmosphere, and unlimited chai refills. This place is a productivity booster.

The ambiance here is so Instagram-worthy. Every corner is thoughtfully designed. We spent almost an hour just clicking photos before ordering. The food was equally good — crispy dosas and strong filter coffee.

Tea Connect is that rare cafe where everything works — food, service, view, and price. Ordered their brunch special and was impressed. Rooftop seating with a skyline view makes it one of the best brunch places in town.

Had high tea here with a group of friends. The spread was lovely — sandwiches, scones, assorted teas. It felt very curated and special. High tea spot in Jaipur doesn't get better than this. Totally recommend.

Kitty party last Saturday and the entire group was thrilled. The rooftop was reserved for us and the service was impeccable. Food came on time, everything was delicious, and the ambiance was festive. Kitty party place in C Scheme — this is it.

What a hidden place in Jaipur this turned out to be! A friend told me about it and I couldn't believe I hadn't heard of it before. The place oozes character and the chai is exceptional. Now I'm the one spreading the word.

Visited during sunrise and the view was absolutely magical. Watching the city slowly wake up from this rooftop with a cup of ginger tea was pure bliss. Sunrise view point in C Scheme doesn't get better than this.

The food here is 100% pure vegetarian and that's a big plus for our family. The taste doesn't compromise one bit — everything is fresh and flavorful. Pure vegetarian restaurant in C Scheme that we'll keep coming back to.

Went on a date here and both of us loved it. Romantic rooftop, fairy lights, gentle music, and amazing food. The staff was discreet and professional. This is the kind of romantic place in Jaipur that makes memories.

Found this cafe near Central Park and was pleasantly surprised. The location is convenient, the cafe is beautiful, and the food is consistently good. Perfect for a quick lunch or a relaxed evening with someone special.

Great open air cafe in Jaipur that manages to stay peaceful even on weekends. The natural ventilation on the rooftop is perfect. Ordered their special masala chai and a veg burger — both were excellent.

First time visiting and I was immediately impressed by the decor. Very earthy, warm tones with plants everywhere. The food was simple but done really well. Underrated cafe in Jaipur that deserves way more attention.

Budget friendly kitty party place in Jaipur — and this is exactly that! We organized a group lunch here and the per-head cost was very reasonable. Food was plentiful and the staff was super accommodating.

The rooftop restaurant experience here is top tier. Sitting under the open sky with a good meal and good company is what weekends are for. The view of C Scheme from the top is lovely and very calming.

Brought my parents here for dinner and they absolutely loved it. Dad praised the Indian cuisine — especially the paneer preparations. The service was respectful and attentive. A great family dining experience.

Perfect place for a date night restaurant experience in Jaipur. The mood lighting, rooftop ambiance, and thoughtful menu make it ideal for couples. We had a wonderful evening and the food was genuinely delicious.

One of those instagrammable cafes in Jaipur that actually delivers on food too. Too many places look good but disappoint on the plate. Here, both the ambiance and the food are on point. Very satisfied customer.

Been here thrice in the past month. The consistency is what I love most. Every visit, the chai tastes the same — perfectly brewed, perfectly spiced. That kind of consistency is rare. Solid all-round experience.

Organized a small office team lunch here. The rooftop setting was perfect for casual conversation. Food arrived quickly and tasted great. Service was professional without being stiff. A great spot for team outings.

This cafe near SMS stadium is really accessible and easy to find. Parking is convenient too. The menu has a good variety of teas, coffees, and food. Tried their breakfast platter and it was filling and tasty.

Came for the sunset view point cafe experience and it delivered completely. The oranges and pinks of the sunset sky from this rooftop were stunning. Combined with hot chai — it was one of those rare perfect moments.

Had my first high tea experience here and it was beautiful. The teas were well-curated and the accompaniments were fresh. Staff explained each item patiently. High spot in C Scheme that's worth dressing up for.

Romantic rooftop place in C Scheme — yes, this is the one. The fairy lights come on at dusk and completely transform the rooftop. We had a lovely quiet dinner and felt completely at ease. Highly recommended for couples.

The breakfast cafe experience here is something else. They make everything in-house — jams, chutneys, breads. You can taste the effort. Ideal for a slow, indulgent morning. Easily one of the best breakfast spots nearby.

Tea Connect is that underrated cafe in C Scheme where locals go but tourists haven't discovered yet. That's actually what makes it special. No rush, no pretense, just good food and great vibes. Love this place.

Visited with my college friends for a group hangout. We sat on the rooftop for almost three hours. The food kept coming and so did the laughter. Best place to hang out in Jaipur — this one is definitely up there.

Had a corporate lunch meeting here and it went really well. The quiet rooftop setting was ideal for focused conversation. Food quality was impressive and the staff managed a large order without any confusion.

The view of Jaipur's skyline from this rooftop cafe is genuinely beautiful. Not something you expect in the middle of C Scheme. Found this as a hidden gem in Jaipur and I'll keep it close to my heart.

Kitty party with my ladies and it was such a hit. The host team was fantastic, the food was great, and the rooftop vibe made everyone feel like royalty. Budget friendly kitty party place in Jaipur — and a fun one!

Came here looking for a cafe near statue circle that's not too loud or crowded. This place ticked every box. Calm, beautiful, great food. The chai here is particularly good — full of flavor and perfectly balanced.

The open air cafe setting here is refreshing. No AC, just good natural breeze and a fantastic rooftop view. In a city like Jaipur where rooftop places are popular, this one stands out for its warmth and authenticity.

Best brunch place I've visited in Jaipur so far. The menu is creative without being pretentious. Everything we ordered — pancakes, chai, sandwiches — was excellent. Will definitely be a regular here going forward.

Tried their Indian cuisine thali and it was a proper meal. Lots of variety, everything fresh, and the taste was home-style good. The rooftop setting elevated the whole experience. A truly satisfying lunch.

Date night was perfect here. Fairy lights, rooftop breeze, excellent food, and a staff that knows how to give couples their space. Date night restaurant goals, honestly. One of our best evenings in Jaipur.
The sunrise view from this rooftop is breathtaking. Woke up early just to come here and it was completely worth it. Sunrise view point in Jaipur — this place should be on every morning person's list.

A cozy hangout spot in Jaipur that gets everything right. Great ambiance, friendly staff, good chai, and a menu that satisfies. We stayed much longer than planned and nobody minded. That's the sign of a great cafe.
Stumbled upon this while searching for a restaurant near Central Park and couldn't be happier. The food is fresh, the view is gorgeous, and the pricing is fair. Now it's our family's weekend go-to.

Pure vegetarian food done right. No compromises on taste or variety. The menu is extensive and every dish we tried was well-seasoned and satisfying. Great to find a pure vegetarian restaurant in C Scheme of this quality.

The rooftop cafe experience here beats most places I've visited in Jaipur. The sky is your ceiling, the city is your view, and the chai is your comfort. Hard to beat that combination on a relaxed afternoon.

Celebrated my mom's birthday here and the staff went out of their way to make it special. They brought a complimentary dessert and sang happy birthday. Lovely gesture. Best birthday party place in Jaipur for intimate gatherings.

The place has this calm and peaceful energy that's hard to find in city cafes. No loud music, no chaos — just a beautifully designed rooftop with great food. Work-friendly cafe in C Scheme that I'll be returning to often.

First time at Tea Connect and I was genuinely impressed. The masala chai was perfectly made and the veg club sandwich was fresh and tasty. Good portion sizes too. Definitely coming back with more friends.

This hidden place in Jaipur deserves so much more recognition. The food is consistently good, the staff is warm, and the rooftop view is hard to beat. Found it through a friend's recommendation and now I recommend it to everyone.

Went for dinner and the rooftop under the stars was magical. The ambiance was romantic and the food was delightful. Best place for candle light dinner in Jaipur — we've now been twice and plan to keep going.
The vibe here is relaxed and welcoming. You don't feel rushed or unwelcome. The staff remembers your face after just one visit. That personal touch makes Tea Connect feel like a neighborhood gem.
Kitty party was a huge success here! The ladies loved the rooftop setting, the food was lovely, and the service was smooth. Kitty party place in C Scheme — this is our new permanent venue.

Honestly the best brunch experience I've had in a long time. Came here on a Sunday morning and the city was still sleepy but this rooftop was alive and buzzing. The food and chai were both outstanding.

Searched for a best dinner cafe near me and ended up here. What a discovery! The dinner menu is solid, the portions are generous, and the rooftop at night is incredibly charming. Very happy with this find.

The Indian cuisine here has a very authentic home-cooked quality to it. Not restaurant-processed, just simple and real. The thali is a great option if you want variety. Very heartwarming meal overall.

Went here for a work meeting and the place was just right. Quiet enough to talk, beautiful enough to impress a client, and the food was genuinely good. Work-friendly cafe in C Scheme that means business.

Romantic rooftop place in Jaipur — Tea Connect sets the standard. The entire setup feels curated for couples. Dim lighting, soft music, elevated view. Our anniversary dinner here was simply unforgettable.

The view of the city during golden hour from this rooftop is stunning. We arrived just before sunset and stayed well into the evening. The staff was accommodating throughout. Wonderful experience all around.

Underrated cafe in Jaipur that local Jaipurians keep to themselves. I discovered it through a Jaipur food blogger and now I understand why it has such a loyal following. The chai is seriously exceptional.
Had breakfast here three weekends in a row now. The consistency is impressive. The menu feels fresh even after multiple visits because of how well each dish is executed. Solid breakfast cafe near me.

The rooftop restaurant ambiance during evenings is truly special. Jaipur's skyline, a warm breeze, and great food — it's the kind of evening that reminds you why you love this city. Totally recommended.
Found this gem near SMS stadium and it's become my post-gym breakfast spot. Quick to reach, always has fresh food ready, and the staff is friendly and efficient. Very happy with this regular spot.

High tea here was a delight. The tea selection was impressive and the sandwiches and pastries were perfectly done. Felt very British and very Jaipur at the same time. High tea spot in Jaipur — bookmarked forever.

The best thing about this place is how genuine it feels. Nothing feels performative or over-designed. It's just a really good rooftop cafe with great food and warm people running it. That authenticity is refreshing.

Came with a group of ten for a birthday dinner. The team handled the reservation efficiently, the food arrived together for everyone, and the birthday setup was beautiful. Excellent group dining experience.

This is that sunset view point cafe in Jaipur that people talk about in hushed tones. The sunset here is genuinely one of Jaipur's best kept secrets. Add great chai and snacks to the mix and you have a perfect evening.
Tea Connect is proof that a cafe doesn't need to be fancy or expensive to be special. Simple, well-done, and honest — that's what this place is. And the rooftop view doesn't hurt either.
Ordered the veg burger and masala chai as a quick lunch. Both were superb. The bun was fresh, the patty was well-spiced, and the chai was perfectly balanced. Fast service, great taste. Will be back.

Went on a solo trip to Jaipur and someone in my guesthouse recommended this place. Best recommendation I got on the trip. The rooftop cafe vibe and the food were a perfect way to spend a Jaipur afternoon.
The best place to hang out in Jaipur with your friend group. Rooftop seating, chill music, great snacks, and reasonable prices. We spent an entire afternoon here and it never felt like too long.

Restaurant near statue circle that's actually worth the visit. I've tried a few others nearby but this one wins on ambiance, food quality, and price. Great all-around value for a rooftop dining experience.

The kitty party here was absolutely fabulous. We had around twelve ladies and everyone was impressed. The food variety was great and the service was incredibly smooth. Budget friendly kitty party place in Jaipur indeed.

Open air cafe vibes done right. The natural light in the morning makes this rooftop feel like a dreamy haven. Had their special chai and poha for breakfast and it was the best way to start a day in Jaipur.

Cozy hangout spot in Jaipur that checks all the boxes. Great food, fantastic view, warm staff, and a vibe that makes you stay longer than you planned. Discovered this recently and already planning my next visit.

The candle light dinner experience here is genuinely romantic. Soft lighting, the right amount of ambient music, and a menu that caters to all tastes. Best place for candle light dinner in Jaipur — we're sold.

Had a lovely team lunch here. The rooftop setting created a relaxed atmosphere that was great for team bonding. Food was served hot and fresh, and everyone had something they enjoyed on the menu. Recommended.
This cafe near Central Park is so easy to reach yet feels like a world away from the city chaos below. That's the magic of a good rooftop. The food and chai only add to the appeal. Love this place.

Instagrammable cafe in Jaipur — absolutely, but it's so much more than just pretty photos. The food is genuinely good, the chai is top notch, and the staff is warm. Don't just come for the gram, come for the experience.
Hidden jam in Jaipur — this phrase perfectly describes Tea Connect. You'd walk past the building without knowing what's upstairs. But once you're up there, you won't want to leave. What a discovery.

The rooftop view here is one of the best in the area. On a clear day you can see quite far across the city. The golden hour makes it even more beautiful. Perfect for leisurely evenings with a cup of tea.

Had an early dinner here and the food was excellent. The pure vegetarian menu has something for every palate. Tried the paneer tikka starter and it was perfectly spiced. Great pure vegetarian restaurant in C Scheme.
Came for a quiet evening alone with a book and the cafe was perfect for it. The ambiance is peaceful, the staff doesn't hover, and the chai keeps coming. A rare find in a city that's always buzzing.

The date night experience here exceeded our expectations. Everything from the lighting to the service was perfectly calibrated for a romantic evening. Date night cafe that Jaipur couples need to know about.

This is what I call a proper rooftop cafe in Jaipur. Not just a terrace with a few tables — a thoughtfully designed space with great furniture, good lighting, and a breathtaking view. The food matches the ambiance.
Breakfast cafe near me — Tea Connect fit the bill perfectly. Their breakfast menu is extensive and every item feels freshly prepared. The paratha with curd and pickle was comfort food at its finest.

Stumbled onto this underrated cafe in C Scheme while walking. The signage is subtle and easy to miss. But the rooftop is a gem. Lovely place, lovely food, lovely staff. Glad I followed my curiosity upstairs.

The Indian cuisine offerings here are deeply satisfying. Everything has that homemade quality that restaurant food often lacks. Had the dal tadka and it was just like mom makes it. Warm and comforting.

Brought clients here for a business lunch and it went brilliantly. The setting impressed them, the food was excellent, and the service was seamless. A great place to make a good impression professionally.

Spent a Sunday morning here with my partner and it was the perfect weekend reset. Slow breakfast, good chai, and a gorgeous view of C Scheme from the rooftop. Best brunch place for a slow, happy morning.

Restaurant near SMS stadium that's a genuine pleasure to visit. Quick drive from the stadium area, beautiful rooftop, and a menu that delivers. Tried their special thali and it was completely satisfying.

The sunsets from this rooftop need to be experienced, not described. We visited specifically for the sunset view and were not disappointed. Add phenomenal chai to the mix and you have a truly special evening.

Went here for a kitty party and it turned out to be the best venue choice we've made in years. The rooftop, the food, the staff — everything was on point. Kitty party place in C Scheme that we'll use again.

The cafe has a lovely, lived-in quality that makes it feel comfortable immediately. Nothing pretentious about it. Just good food, good chai, and a great rooftop view. Highly recommend for anyone visiting Jaipur.

High tea here was an elegant experience. The selection of teas was impressive — Darjeeling, Assam, herbal blends. The sandwiches and cakes were freshly made. High tea spot in Jaipur that sets the bar high.

This rooftop restaurant is perfect for a family dinner. Enough space for everyone, a menu that caters to all ages, and service that's attentive without being overbearing. A well-rounded dining experience.
Hidden place in Jaipur that I was lucky to discover. The rooftop feel, the quality of the food, and the overall vibe put it well above average. Sharing this with everyone I know who visits Jaipur.

Went for a sunrise breakfast and the experience was unforgettable. The sun coming up over Jaipur from this rooftop — with a hot cup of chai in hand — was something special. Sunrise view point in Jaipur, no question.

The staff here genuinely care about your experience. They checked in without being intrusive, offered recommendations when asked, and were quick to resolve a small order confusion. Great service culture.

Tea Connect has become my favorite weekend haunt. The rooftop is breezy, the food is reliably good, and the vibe is consistently calm. Not many cafes manage to maintain this standard across every visit.

Visited for a solo working session and the setup was ideal. Comfortable seating, good WiFi, minimal noise, and chai that kept coming. Work-friendly cafe in C Scheme that actually supports productivity.
The rooftop view here at night is stunning. The city lights spread out below while you dine under the stars. Romantic and beautiful — this is what a rooftop restaurant in Jaipur should feel like.

Best dinner cafe near me, hands down. The evening menu is solid, the rooftop lights up beautifully, and the service is warm. Had the paneer butter masala and it was genuinely restaurant-quality great.
Really enjoyed the open air cafe experience here. Fresh air, good food, and a relaxed atmosphere. In a world where everything is indoors and air-conditioned, this rooftop is a lovely change of pace.

Came here after seeing it tagged on Instagram and the real thing is even better than the pictures. The instagrammable cafe in Jaipur tag is well earned. The food is the real star though — don't come just for photos.

Had a wonderful birthday dinner here. The staff surprised us with a small decoration on the table and the entire team wished us warmly. Best birthday party place in Jaipur for an intimate, personal celebration.

Tea Connect strikes that perfect balance between affordable and quality. The food is priced fairly and the portions are generous. You leave feeling like you got real value. Not something all cafes manage.

Cozy hangout spot in Jaipur that I keep bringing different friends to. Everyone loves it. The rooftop vibe, the chai, the food — it all adds up to a consistently great time. Go here, you won't regret it.

The view of the Jaipur skyline from the rooftop is one of those views that stays with you. Visited during golden hour and it was picture perfect. The chai was equally golden — perfectly spiced and aromatic.

Had a lovely kitty party lunch here. Everything from the welcome to the dessert was managed beautifully. The host team is organized and experienced with group events. Budget friendly kitty party place in Jaipur that delivers.
This cafe near statue circle is a real winner. Location is prime, rooftop is gorgeous, food is excellent. Whether it's a casual lunch or a special dinner, this place adapts to both with ease.
The Indian cuisine thali here is one of the most satisfying meals you can have in C Scheme. Fresh rotis, multiple gravies, dal, rice, and dessert. It's a full meal that leaves you happy and content.

First time here was for a date and we've been back three times since. The romantic rooftop setting and consistently good food make it our default date spot. Romantic rooftop place in Jaipur that we love.
Spent an afternoon here with my sister just catching up. The rooftop made the whole experience feel special. Good food, quiet corners, and a lovely view. Perfect for long, unhurried conversations.

The food quality here is genuinely impressive for the price point. Everything tastes fresh and well-prepared. The kitchen seems to really care about what they're putting out. That comes through in every bite.

Best place to hang out for sure — especially if you love open air seating and a great rooftop view. The chai and snacks are solid, the ambiance is relaxed, and the staff leaves you to enjoy your time.

Tried the breakfast platter here and it was one of the best breakfast experiences I've had in Jaipur. Fresh fruits, eggs, toast, chai — all perfectly executed. Best brunch place for a complete morning meal.

The rooftop cafe setup here is thoughtfully done. No clutter, good seating, and the view is unobstructed. The food menu is concise but well-thought-out. Quality over quantity — that's the philosophy here.
Candle light dinner in Jaipur — Tea Connect delivers this beautifully. Soft lighting, quiet music, and an elegant rooftop setting make it perfect for a romantic evening. The food was wonderful too.
Restaurant near Central Park that's a genuine gem. The location is great, the rooftop is stunning, and the food is consistently good. Perfect for everything from casual lunches to romantic dinners.
Underrated cafe in Jaipur that needs more visibility. Great Indian cuisine, excellent tea selection, rooftop ambiance — this place has it all. Why more people don't know about it is a mystery to me.
This open air cafe feels like a sanctuary in the middle of C Scheme. The city buzz below, the calm above. Spent a beautiful afternoon here with my chai and a good book. Exactly what I needed.

Had the special high tea menu and it was a sophisticated experience. Tiered trays of sandwiches and sweets, a pot of perfectly brewed Assam tea, and attentive service. High tea spot in Jaipur that's genuinely elegant.
Found this cafe near SMS stadium and it's now my Friday evening ritual. The rooftop at dusk is beautiful, the chai is excellent, and the snacks are always fresh. A perfect end to the work week.
The sunset view point cafe experience here is absolutely top class. We timed our visit perfectly and watched the sky turn from blue to orange to pink. With chai in hand and good company — pure magic.
Pure vegetarian restaurant in C Scheme that gets it right. The menu is diverse, the flavors are authentic, and nothing feels like a compromise. Vegetarians in Jaipur — this place is for you.

Tea Connect is what Jaipur cafes should aspire to be. Great food, beautiful rooftop, warm service, and honest pricing. It's the full package. Easily one of the best rooftop cafes I've visited in the city.
Came here as a hidden gem recommendation from a local and left completely converted. This place is special. The rooftop, the chai, the staff — everything has a quality that's hard to find elsewhere.

Great spot for working remotely. The WiFi is reliable, the seating is comfortable, and the chai keeps you going. The rooftop gives you a view that makes even the most tedious work feel better. Work-friendly cafe indeed.
Had a group dinner here and the experience was seamless. Large group orders handled efficiently, food arrived hot, and everyone found something they loved. Great staff, great food, great evening.

The instagrammable cafe in Jaipur tag is real — but so is the quality of food. Beautiful decor, a stunning rooftop, and a menu that delivers. Don't let the aesthetics fool you into thinking it's all style.

This breakfast cafe near me has become my Sunday morning tradition. The breakfast spread is varied, fresh, and satisfying. The rooftop is quiet in the morning and that calm sets the tone for a great day.
Romantic rooftop place in C Scheme — this is it. The view, the lighting, the food, the staff — everything conspires to make the evening feel special. Our go-to spot for anything romantic in Jaipur.
The cafe has this warmth that's hard to describe. You walk in and immediately feel welcome. The staff smiles genuinely, the food is homey and comforting, and the rooftop view is the cherry on top.

Visited on a weekday afternoon and it was blissfully quiet. Had the full rooftop to ourselves almost. Ordered chai and a sandwich and just soaked in the view. Hidden place in Jaipur — this absolutely qualifies.

Budget friendly kitty party place in Jaipur that doesn't compromise on experience. Our group had an absolute blast. Great food, beautiful rooftop, attentive service. Exactly what you'd want from a kitty party venue.
The rooftop view here during the golden hour is the kind of thing travel blogs write about. Warm light, city below, chai in hand. Tea Connect has created something genuinely special in C Scheme.
Indian cuisine here is authentic and freshly prepared. Had the dal makhani and it was slow-cooked perfection. The rotis were soft and hot off the tawa. A proper North Indian meal done right.

Visited Tea Connect for the first time yesterday and already planning my second visit. The rooftop is beautiful, the chai is outstanding, and the service is friendly. A genuinely great cafe experience.
Date night cafe in Jaipur doesn't need to be expensive to be perfect. This place proves that. The rooftop ambiance, the quality of food, and the attentive service made our date evening truly special.

The rooftop restaurant here is a class apart. Well-maintained, thoughtfully designed, and offering stunning views. The food menu is varied and everything we ordered was cooked with obvious care and skill.

Sunrise here is a whole experience. We came early, grabbed the best corner table, and watched the city light up with the rising sun. Chai in hand, good company — sunrise view point in C Scheme perfection.

This place near statue circle has quickly become one of Jaipur's best kept secrets. The rooftop is gorgeous and the food is consistently excellent. Glad to have found it before it becomes too crowded.
Tea Connect manages to be both relaxed and lively at the same time. The rooftop has energy without being chaotic. A great balance that not many cafes manage to strike. Love this place.
Best place to hang out in Jaipur with a group. Spacious rooftop, great food, affordable prices, and a vibe that keeps everyone happy. Took my college friends here and everyone wants to come again.

The high tea here was served with such care and detail. The teas were named and described by the staff, the food pairings were thoughtful, and the presentation was beautiful. High tea spot in Jaipur — exceptional.

Had a business breakfast here and it was the perfect setting. Professional ambiance, good food, and excellent service. My client was impressed and we had a very productive conversation over chai and parathas.
This rooftop cafe in Jaipur hits differently in the evening. The city below buzzes while you sit up here in this calm bubble. The food is great and the ambiance is unmatched. A must-visit spot.

Came for the best dinner cafe near me recommendation and wasn't disappointed. Dinner menu was solid, the rooftop was lit beautifully for the evening, and the service was warm and attentive throughout.

The open air cafe vibe at Tea Connect is refreshing. No walls closing you in, just sky above and city below. The breeze, the view, and the food make it one of those cafes you remember long after you leave.
Had a solo brunch here and it was perfect. No pressure, no rush. Just me, a great view, and excellent food. The staff checked in occasionally without hovering. Just the right amount of attention.
Kitty party here was a dream. The rooftop setting made everyone feel glamorous without spending a fortune. Kitty party place in C Scheme that's now permanently on our list for monthly gatherings.
This is the kind of cozy hangout spot in Jaipur that you find once and keep going back to. The chai, the vibe, the rooftop — all perfectly curated for a relaxed, happy time. Highly recommend.
Tea Connect's rooftop view during the evening is absolutely beautiful. The city lights slowly coming on as the sun sets — there's a cinematic quality to it. And the food only adds to the experience.
The Indian cuisine thali here offers great variety at a very fair price. Dal, sabzi, paneer dish, salad, roti, rice, and dessert. Everything fresh and well-made. Very satisfying lunch for the price.
Came here for a quick lunch between meetings and left deeply impressed. The food was ready quickly, tasted excellent, and the rooftop gave me a much-needed mental break. Will definitely come back.
Discovered this hidden gem in Jaipur last month and have already visited four times. The consistency is remarkable. Same great chai, same warm service, same beautiful view every single time.

Had a birthday celebration here for a close friend. The team decorated the rooftop with balloons and a banner and the birthday person was genuinely touched. Best birthday party place in Jaipur — personal and heartfelt.

The cafe is clean, well-maintained, and the washrooms are spotless — something many cafes overlook. Combined with great food and a beautiful rooftop, Tea Connect has its priorities in the right order.
Restaurant near SMS stadium that's worth the visit even if you're not near the area. Rooftop views, Indian cuisine, great chai — it's worth the drive. One of Jaipur's better kept restaurant secrets.
Tea Connect is that sunset view point cafe in C Scheme that serious sunset lovers know about. The colors of the sky from this rooftop are breathtaking. Come before 6 PM to get the best spot.

The rooftop here is genuinely romantic even without any special occasion. Just the view, the fairy lights, and a good companion make for a beautiful evening. Romantic rooftop place in Jaipur at its finest.

Work-friendly cafe in C Scheme with excellent WiFi and great chai. Spent a productive five-hour working session here. The ambiance is calm and the staff understood that I needed space. Perfect remote work spot.
Best brunch place in Jaipur for lazy weekend mornings. The brunch menu is creative and indulgent, the rooftop is beautiful, and the chai is exceptional. The perfect antidote to a hectic week.

Underrated cafe in C Scheme that locals treasure. It has that neighborhood cafe warmth combined with a rooftop experience that rivals the fancier places. All at a very reasonable price. Wonderful find.

The view here is genuinely panoramic. You can see across a good stretch of Jaipur from the rooftop. During sunset, it becomes almost painterly. Sunset view point cafe in Jaipur — this place is the answer.

Came for dinner on a special occasion and the rooftop was perfect for it. The star-lit sky above, gentle breeze, great food, and attentive service — the full romantic dinner experience. Couldn't have asked for more.
